arts.ttl: Michail Antonio gets warm reception at London Stadium ahead of West Ham game
arts.sum: The 34-year-old was hospitalised on December 7 when his car collided with a tree.

arts.ttl: Michail Antonio given hero's welcome on West Ham return after horror car crash
arts.sum: West Ham forward Michail Antonio was back at the London Stadium and took to the pitch before the Hammers' Premier League clash against Newcastle on Monday night

arts.ttl: LIVE: West Ham host Newcastle in the Premier League
arts.sum: West Ham host Newcastle United at the London Stadium in the Premier League. ESPN has live updates.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe identifies 'frustrated' Newcastle United goalscoring threat to replace Anthony Gordon
arts.sum: Newcastle United boss Eddie Howe has backed Harvey Barnes to fill the void left by Anthony Gordon on the left-hand side of the Magpies' attack. "I think he's someone that we really believe in, he's been a bit frustrated with his lack of opportunities in the Premier League because of the form of Anthony Gordon.

arts.ttl: West Ham v Newcastle team news: Isak starts
arts.sum: West Ham are unchanged for the visit of the Magpies The post West Ham v Newcastle team news: Isak starts appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: West Ham v Newcastle: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Premier League updates from the 8pm GMT kick-off Live scores | Premier League top scorers | Mail Michael 3 min: Kudus loses the ball in midfield and Trippier is onto it in a flash. Only a brilliant sliding tackle from Kilman stops a dangerous Newcastle counter-attack. Kilman was out of position and fully committed to that tackle. He had to win the ball, and he did. 1 min: Forty-three seconds on the clock and West Ham have a golden chance to open the scoring! Kudus turns Schar inside out on the left wing, crosses towards Soucek at the back post. The Czech international takes a clumsy first touch but still evades Livramento but blazes over from six yards out with his weaker foot. Soucek was on the stretch as he chased that heavy first touch but still should have buried it! Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Jim Ratcliffe reveals why Dan Ashworth really left Man United after Newcastle United deal
arts.sum: Sir Jim Ratcliffe has revealed that Dan Ashworth left Manchester United because the 'chemistry' was not right. A settlement was finally reached last summer, but Ashworth ended up spending as much time on gardening leave as the 54-year-old did formally working at Old Trafford following his shock departure in December.

arts.ttl: West Ham vs. Newcastle confirmed XIs: Is Isak fit to start for the Magpies?
arts.sum: West Ham United and Newcastle United confirm their starting lineups for this evening’s Premier League clash at the London Stadium. Is Alexander Isak fit to start for the Magpies?

arts.ttl: Paquetá returns to squad for unchanged Hammers
arts.sum: Head Coach Graham Potter has named an unchanged West Ham United starting XI for the third Premier League game in a row for Monday’s home fixture with Newcastle United. Potter has kept faith with the same players who started the 1-0 victory at Arsenal on 22 February and 2-0 home win over Leicester City on 27 February, and victory tonight would make it three straight in the top-flight for the first time since December 2023.

arts.ttl: Analysis: Potter's new formation can exploit Newcastle's weakened left flank
arts.sum: West Ham come into a home match against Newcastle United having won consecutive Premier League matches for the first time this season. Using a new formation that seems to suit star men Jarrod Bowen and Mohammed Kudus, the Hammers are unlikely to change their approach on Monday evening.
